MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ALAN HORWITZ FOR PLAINTIFF FOLSOM/DORE ASSOCIATES. KEVIN EDELBROCK, AGENT FOR PLAINTIFF.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY SARA MALAN FOR DEFENDANT JOHN THOMAN

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE TENANCY IF PAYMENTS AND COMPLETE CERTIFICATEION PROCESS. $500 DUE ON 6/1/06(INSTEAD OF 5/20/06) AND AN EXTRA $150 PER 5TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL $1120 IS PAID IN FULL. DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE THE CERTIFICATION PROCESS IN 10 DAYS AND THE SF ELIGIBILITY PROCESS IN 45 DAYS. (AN EXTENSION MAY BE ALLOWED). THE LIVING CARE ATTENDANT ALSO NEEDS TO COMPLY. DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BY LEASE TERMS AND CONDITIONS. BALCONY NEEDS TO BE CLEARED AND DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH GUEST POLICIES. IF DEFENDANT ABIDES BY AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH PAYMENTS, PLAINTIFF TO SEEK IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT BY EX PARTE APPLICATION AND DECLARATION WITH 48HR PHONE NOTICE TO 415.701.1200, FOR RESTITUION AND POSSESSION, RENT, DAMAGES AND COSTS LESS ANY CREDITS. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE CERTIFICATION PROCESS, PLAINTIFF TO SEEK JUDGMENT WITH 96HR FAX NOTICE TO 415.701.1400.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS. SO ORDERED.

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL (218)
